name: Stories to Tell [Alpha 2] - Downhill Cemetery
short_description: In "Stories to tell - Downhill Cemetery" you are a young Japanese man named Hiroshi who decided to move to a new house, he did not know what awaited him...
detailed_description:
Stories to Tell is a saga of psychological horror video games where each episode is based on dreams/nightmares that I, the developer, have had. (the episodes are short).

-This is the second video game in the saga.

In "Stories to tell - Downhill Cemetery" you are a young Japanese man named Hiroshi who decided to move to a new house, he did not know what awaited him...

key features of "Stories to Tell - Downhill Cemetery"

-VHS aesthetics.
-Dialogues between characters.

supported_languages:
English, French, German, Spanish - Spain*, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
